title: Require Public Domain Surfaces In Recipes And Maps
forbids: recipe source importing domain code outside public domain root, ops, artifacts, model/schemas, model/policy, or explicitly admitted model/data collection surfaces
why: The G4 import matrix is positive recipe boundary authority: standard recipe source composes domains through named public surfaces, not relative reaches, retired config facades, shared buckets, broad data buckets, operation-local files, or private implementation modules.
message: Recipe and map source may import domain code only through @mapgen/domain/<domain>, /ops, /artifacts, /model/schemas, /model/policy, or approved /model/data collections.
